prompt: {"type":"editorial infographic poster","style":"Swiss-modern graphic design with brutalist typography, minimalist grid layout, monochrome base with acid-lime accents, halftone textures, collage elements, clean negative space, high-contrast black text on a very light warm gray background","subject":"an infographic explaining the lifecycle of internet memes as a cultural system","canvas":{"orientation":"portrait","background":"very light gray paper texture"},"layout":{"headline_block":{"position":"top-left","title":"The Meme Lifecycle","subtitle_top":"Viral today, gone tomorrow.","body":"Memes move fast. They're born, spread, evolve, peak, and fade—only to be remembered, remixed, or forgotten. This is the cycle."},"intro_icon":{"position":"upper-left near headline","description":"small outlined square containing a globe icon with short caption to the right","caption":"// a universal cycle in the attention economy"},"left_sidebar":{"position":"far-left vertical","count":4,"items":["heart outline icon","speech bubble outline icon","repost/retweet outline icon","bookmark outline icon"]},"main_sections":{"count":5,"path":"connected by thin black curved arrows forming a looping cycle across the page","sections":[{"number":"01","title":"BIRTH","position":"upper-right","visual":"black-and-white halftone cat portrait facing forward, wearing oversized neon-lime star-shaped sunglasses; behind the cat are a jagged acid-lime starburst with a lowercase letter 'a' on it and a lime dotted rectangle","body":"A spark of an idea. New format, new joke, new context. It's niche. It's everything."},{"number":"02","title":"SPREAD","position":"center-right","visual":"large warped black wordmark reading 'SPREAD' stretched vertically and liquified, with several small acid-lime square arrow icons around it and tiny black crop/corner marks","body":"Shared, reposted, reshared. It escapes its original context. It finds the people."},{"number":"03","title":"EVOLVE","position":"mid-left","visual":"collage of 4 overlapping elements: a browser-window-framed grayscale Mona Lisa crop, a huge lowercase acid-lime 'e' in front, a black-and-white pixel-art block shape on the right, and a small acid-lime note box listing the word 'evolve' 5 times with the last line faded","body":"Remixed. Recontextualized. It mutates into new forms. The joke adapts or dies."},{"number":"04","title":"PEAK","position":"mid-right lower than spread","visual":"lime bell-curve histogram made of thin vertical bars inside a black measurement frame with a small central crosshair","body":"Maximum visibility. Mainstream adoption. Everyone gets it. Then it starts to get old."},{"number":"05","title":"FADE","position":"lower-left to lower-center","visual":"the word 'fade' in bold black lowercase, disintegrating into scattered black particles toward the right","body":"Interest drops. New memes take over. It fades into obscurity—or legacy."}]},"bottom_callout":{"position":"lower-left","icon":"small black square with white asterisk/star symbol","text":"Memes are temporary. Impact isn't...","button":"What will you create?"},"footer":{"position":"bottom full width","count":4,"columns":[{"label":"FORMAT:","value":"Digital culture artifact"},{"label":"CYCLE TIME:","value":"Seconds to years (maybe forever)"},{"label":"FUEL:","value":"Creativity, context, community"},{"label":"OUTCOME:","value":"Laughter, connection, culture"}],"extra_icon":"small target/crosshair icon at the far bottom-right"}},"typography":{"headline":"extra-large bold neo-grotesk sans serif","section_numbers":"very large bold condensed sans serif","section_titles":"uppercase bold sans serif with acid-lime underline accent","body":"small clean sans serif, flush-left","footer":"small uppercase labels with lighter body text"},"color_palette":{"base":"black and off-white","accent":"acid lime / chartreuse","secondary":"grayscale halftone"},"composition_notes":"editorial poster balance with oversized title on the left and modular infographic panels on the right, lots of open space, precise alignment, contemporary design-magazine aesthetic, crisp vector lines mixed with distressed raster collage textures"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"编辑信息图海报","style":"瑞士现代平面设计，融合粗野主义排版、极简网格布局、单色基调配以酸橙色点缀、半色调纹理、拼贴元素、简洁的留白，以及在极浅暖灰色背景上的高对比度黑色文字","subject":"一张解释互联网 Meme 作为一种文化系统生命周期的信息图","canvas":{"orientation":"纵向","background":"极浅灰色纸张纹理"},"layout":{"headline_block":{"position":"左上角","title":"Meme 生命周期","subtitle_top":"今日爆火，明日即逝。","body":"Meme 的传播速度极快。它们诞生、传播、演变、达到顶峰并逐渐消退——最终被铭记、重混或遗忘。这就是循环。"},"intro_icon":{"position":"左上角标题附近","description":"一个小型的轮廓正方形，内含一个地球图标，右侧带有简短说明","caption":"// 注意力经济中的通用循环"},"left_sidebar":{"position":"最左侧垂直排列","count":4,"items":["心形轮廓图标","对话气泡轮廓图标","转发/转推轮廓图标","书签轮廓图标"]},"main_sections":{"count":5,"path":"由细黑色曲线箭头连接，在页面上形成一个循环路径","sections":[{"number":"01","title":"诞生","position":"右上角","visual":"黑白半色调猫咪肖像，正视前方，戴着超大霓虹酸橙色星形太阳镜；猫咪身后是一个带有小写字母 'a' 的锯齿状酸橙色星爆图案和一个酸橙色虚线矩形","body":"灵感的火花。新的格式，新的笑话，新的语境。它是小众的。它是一切。"},{"number":"02","title":"传播","position":"中右侧","visual":"巨大的变形黑色文字 'SPREAD'，垂直拉伸并液化，周围有几个小型酸橙色方形箭头图标和微小的黑色裁剪/角标","body":"分享、转发、再分享。它脱离了原始语境。它找到了受众。"},{"number":"03","title":"演变","position":"中左侧","visual":"4 个重叠元素的拼贴：一个带有浏览器窗口边框的灰度蒙娜丽莎裁剪图，前方有一个巨大的小写酸橙色 'e'，右侧是一个黑白像素艺术块形状，以及一个小的酸橙色便签框，列出了 5 次 'evolve' 一词，最后一行逐渐淡出","body":"重混。重新语境化。它变异成新的形式。笑话要么适应，要么消亡。"},{"number":"04","title":"巅峰","position":"中右侧（低于传播）","visual":"由细垂直条组成的酸橙色钟形曲线直方图，位于黑色测量框内，带有一个小型中心十字准线","body":"最高可见度。主流采纳。每个人都懂了。然后它开始变得陈旧。"},{"number":"05","title":"消退","position":"左下至中下","visual":"粗体黑色小写单词 'fade'，向右逐渐分解为散落的黑色颗粒","body":"兴趣下降。新的 Meme 取而代之。它逐渐淡出，走向默默无闻——或成为遗产。"}]},"bottom_callout":{"position":"左下角","icon":"带有白色星号/星形符号的小型黑色正方形","text":"Meme 是暂时的。但影响力不是……","button":"你会创造什么？"},"footer":{"position":"底部全宽","count":4,"columns":[{"label":"格式：","value":"数字文化产物"},{"label":"周期时长：","value":"几秒到几年（或许永远）"},{"label":"燃料：","value":"创造力、语境、社区"},{"label":"结果：","value":"欢笑、连接、文化"}],"extra_icon":"最右下角的小型目标/十字准线图标"}},"typography":{"headline":"超大号粗体新格罗特斯克无衬线字体","section_numbers":"超大号粗体压缩无衬线字体","section_titles":"大写粗体无衬线字体，配有酸橙色下划线强调","body":"小型简洁无衬线字体，左对齐","footer":"小型大写标签，配以较轻的正文文字"},"color_palette":{"base":"黑色和灰白色","accent":"酸橙色 / 黄绿色","secondary":"灰度半色调"},"composition_notes":"编辑海报平衡感，左侧为超大标题，右侧为模块化信息图面板，大量留白，精确对齐，当代设计杂志美学，清晰的矢量线条与粗糙的栅格拼贴纹理混合"}

breakdown.creativeCore: Meme 生命周期编辑信息图：一张现代海报风格的信息图，展示了 Meme 的五个生命周期阶段，非常适合编辑设计、社会评论或趋势文化演示。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, callout, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, minimalist]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
